allow: Bash(curl -s -o /tmp/test_en.mp3 -w '%{http_code} | content-type: %{content_type} | size: %{size_download} bytes' -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/tts -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text": "Hello, this is a test of ElevenLabs voice.", "language": "en-IN"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/tts -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text": "Hello, this is a test.", "language": "en-IN"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"Create an invoice for Ravi for 2 chairs at 5000","conversation_id":"__TRACKED_VAR__","language":"en-IN"}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('REPLY:', d.get\('reply'\)\); print\('ACTIONS:', json.dumps\(d.get\('actions'\), indent=2\)\)")
